export interface UnsubscriptionError extends Error { readonly errors: any[]; } export interface UnsubscriptionErrorCtor { /** * @deprecated Internal implementation detail. Do not construct error instances. * Cannot be tagged as internal: https://github.com/ReactiveX/rxjs/issues/6269 */ new (errors: any[]): UnsubscriptionError; } /** * An error thrown when one or more errors have occurred during the * `unsubscribe` of a {@link Subscription}. */ export declare const UnsubscriptionError: UnsubscriptionErrorCtor; //# sourceMappingURL=UnsubscriptionError.d.ts.map
